title: Contact us - Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives - Canada.ca
content:
The SR&ED program is administered through the coordinating tax services offices. If you have any questions about SR&ED tax incentives, contact the coordinating tax services office for your region.
For SR&ED services in Alberta, contact the Fraser Valley and Interior Tax Services Office.

### Fraser Valley and Interior Tax Services Office
1-866-578-4538 (opens up phone application) 1-866-578-4538
8 am to 4 pm (local time)
Closed on public holidays
Canada Revenue Agency Scientific Research and Experimental Development Division 9755 King George Blvd Surrey BC  V3T 5E1
418-556-1825 (toll-free: 1-833-646-1575)
Include the following information on your fax cover sheet so that your document gets routed correctly and without delays.
- The name of the tax services office that serves your area
- The name of the Canada Revenue Agency employee (if you have it)
- The name of your business
- Your business number
For SR&ED services in British Columbia, contact the Fraser Valley and Interior Tax Services Office.
